expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.content:
Hi {{3.`1`}},

Welcome, and thank you for signing up for our SEO Audit service! We're excited to dig into your website and uncover the opportunities that'll move your search rankings forward.

Here's what happens next: 

Our team will begin reviewing your site's technical health, content, and backlink profile within the next few business days.

In the meantime, if you have any specific goals, competitors, or concerns you'd like us to pay extra attention to, just reply to this email and let us know — the more context we have, the sharper the audit.

We're glad to have you on board, and we're looking forward to helping you grow.

Best, 
Jesse Veluz
SEO expert
mapper.subject: Welcome aboard, {{3.`1`}} — let's get your SEO audit started!

contentType.label: application/jsonEnter data in the JSON format, as a string or using a data structure.

inputMethod.label: JSON stringEnter the JSON body as a raw text string. If values contain JSON reserved characters, you must escape them manually.
